commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=3f839fd679c9fcc5e2671421159190e194d796f4)
commands.review_summary:
The PR changes the Ollama provider policy resolver to classify unspecified-reasoning models as reasoning-capable when their model id matches the existing Ollama reasoning-name heuristic.

PR surface: Source +8. Total +8 across 1 file.

Reproducibility: yes. from source, but not from a live run. Telegram native `/think` menus use configured catalog metadata by default, while the linked live-discovered `glm-5.2:cloud` model lacks configured reasoning and the PR fallback regex does not match it.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The PR needs contributor revision and real behavior proof; automation should not take over while the external proof gate is missing.

target.title: fix: improve Ollama thinking profile resolution for live-discovered reasoning models using name heuristic
target.body:
## Problem
Telegram  menu shows only  for live-discovered Ollama thinking models (no catalog entry), but  accepts them.

## Root Cause
For models discovered at runtime (not in static config/catalog),  flag passed to  is . The Ollama plugin previously returned an off-only profile when  was not explicitly true.

## Solution
Modified  in  to also consider model name heuristics when  is not explicitly false. We now treat a model as reasoning if either:
-  (catalog explicitly says it's a reasoning model)
-  returns true (based on common reasoning model naming patterns)

This ensures that live-discovered Ollama models with reasoning capabilities (e.g. deepseek-r1, qwen3:...thinker) get the full thinking level menu, while still respecting explicit non-reasoning flags.

Fixes #93835
target.author: lizanle521
